operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_psmgr_poll
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun write_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  write_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) ) (=  false (=  (_ bv4294967295 32) ?B1 ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun write_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  write_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun write_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  (_ bv4294967295 32) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  write_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  write_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_desc.write_count is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
